Half Marathon.note: Based on 3 clean race result(s). Reasonably grounded if based on a 10K+ result; more of a stretch if only projected from 5K.

Marathon.note: Based on 3 clean race result(s). CAVEAT: marathon projections from short-race data are unreliable — doesn't account for fuelling or sustained multi-hour effort. Rough ballpark only.

excluded_races.name: Lightning Bolt 10K
excluded_races.reason: First race back after off-season. Logged for history, but excluded from prediction — 3+ months old and early-season fitness isn't representative of current form for a race this far out.

excluded_races.name: Cotswold Way Relay (leg)
excluded_races.reason: Respiratory episode in heat. Relay leg, off-road and extremely hilly — not comparable to a flat standalone race. Excluded from Riegel projection.

key_sessions_note: Logged for reference only — not converted into a predicted time. Converting interval-rep pace to race pace has no reliable formula; use your own judgement on what these sessions suggest.
